subcodes.first_line: My God, my God! Thou seest the branches of the Tree of Eternity and the leaves of Thy most exalted Paradise, turning unto Thy Most Glorious Beauty, drawn unto the Most High Lord, yearning to behold Thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی تری افنان دوحة البقآء و ورقات جنّتک العلیا متوجّهین الی جمالک الأبهی منجذبین الی الرّبّ الأعلی مشتاقین للمشاهدة
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for victory and requital; triumph of the Cause, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @growth of the Cause, @praise and encouragement, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration
